title: Ore And More [Forge/Neoforge]
body:
[Here the full curseforge page ;)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oam-by-choupiclou2007)

💫Ore and More (OAM) is a Forge mod that add a ton of new stuff to Minecraft. Especially some ores, armors, tools, weapons...
I recommend you to install JEI for the recipes and Better Combat for the swords animations !
And try out Choup's Better Vanilla Tools for some OAM-like vanilla tools !💫

**~~🌟Vanilla changes :~~**

**Copper :**

Ore and more make the Vanilla Copper even better ! You can now craft an armor, some tools, and a shear...

It's a very early game ore set and the tools are not really resistant.



**Amethyst :**

You can transform the vanilla amethyst shards into an armor, and a tool set + into OAM weapons !

The armor is an equavalent of the iron one, the full amethyst armor give you Resistance I and the tools are a bit more durable than the iron !

Emerald : Emerald can be transformed into an armor, some tools and into OAM weapon as you may have guessed ! The armor is an iron equivalent but more resitant and the full set give you a permanent Hero Of The Village effect to trade with the NPC.
The tools have around 300 uses and are pretty effective !



**~~🌟Ore And More Materials :~~**

**Demonite :**
Demonite is undoubtedly the best mineral in the game, especially in OAM. It's very powerful, making you almost invincible, but fortunately it's very hard to find it. You'll need at least a netherite tier pickaxe to find the ore, as Demonite is a mineral formed in the Overworld in layers very close to lava (y:-58/-54)
I recommend using some TNTs to find it easily.
You can of course craft armour, tools, a shield, OAM weapons, and even a crown... !





**Chlorophyte Ore :**

The Cholorophyte is one of the best ore of the mod! It can be found in the jungle. The ore is extremely rare but if you found one ore you'll just have to harvest others. So basically if you found the ore you'll have to put mud blocks around and then they will slowly transform into new ores ! 
Layer (y: 0/-54)


**Ruby :**
The ruby is an diamond equivalent (y:1/-58). The full armor set give you Regen I and when you right click with any tools it will give you Regen 2 for 5s with a cooldown of 50s. The ruby special ability is the regeneration.
You can even craft a netherite armor upgrade with it, the Netherite Ruby Armor (give you Regen I constantly when equipped )


**Auric Ore :**
The Auric Ore is also one of OAM's special 'ore'. So it's harder to make and more powerful. You'll need to craft it a raw gold block, a raw iron block and an ancient debris block that you'll place in a special order to transform them into an auric ore block (see the image in the "Images" section). The tools special ability is that when you right click with one of them it will spawn 3 ligthning bolts... i let you see ^^ ! The armor full set give you also some cool effect !



**Fire Amber :**
The fire amber is a gem that spawn into the Nether Forests it was created to make the Demonite easier to find because the Fire Amber Pickaxe is Netherite Tier so you can mine Demonite Ore with it. The Fire Amber Armor full set gives you a permanent Fire Resistance effect. The tools set the target on fire too !



**Rose Quartz :**


It's again a simple ore same as the iron but you can find it in the desert ! It does nothing special but it was made more for the collection like Amethyst or others ! 
Equivalent to the iron ore but pink !

**~~🌟Ore and More weapons :~~**

OAM adds some new weapons to the game : Paxels, Katanas, Hammers, Scythes, The Dragon Slayer (BERSERKKK) and The End Sword.

Paxels are a fusion between all the tools.
Katanas are faster swords but do less damages
Hammers are very slow weapon but do great damages and have increased knockback
Scythes are slower weapons that do higher damage too
The Dragon Slayer is a Berserk reference ^^ and is very efficient !
The End Sword is a sword made of all the Vanilla Bosses items ! (Ender Dragon, Wither, Ancient Guardian )



🌟And even More -> go check "Images" section !

**~~🌟Permission:~~**

-Feel free to use my mods in your modpacks !
-Do not reupload the mod elsewhere !
